raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The bill AB 1502 strengthens oversight of nursing homes in California.",
    "The California Department of Public Health (CDPH) is given stronger authority to prohibit unqualified and unethical owners from operating skilled nursing facilities.",
    "The lack of proper oversight has been linked to dangers faced by seniors living in nursing homes, particularly during the pandemic.",
    "Some nursing home operators in California are reportedly operating without a license.",
    "Certain nursing home chains have had licensure applications denied due to poor conditions in their facilities.",
    "A nursing home operated by Gateway Care and Rehabilitation is under criminal investigation related to a COVID-19 outbreak."
  ]
}
```
